field.label: Enable YARA Scan
field.help: Enable additional YARA rules scan using bundled ICS/OT signature set.

field.label: Monitored Protocols
field.help: Protocols for plaintext file extraction and sidecar scanning.

field.label: High-Risk Extensions
field.help: Comma separated list (e.g. exe,dll,elf,sh,bin). Effective for plaintext protocols only.

field.label: Block Duration (seconds)
field.help: Temporary source block duration after malware detection.

field.label: Threat Response
field.help: Choose how infected files are handled: block source IP, alert only, or drop sample only.

field.label: Max File Size (MB)
field.help: Files larger than this limit are skipped immediately.

field.label: Scan Queue Size
field.help: Bounded queue size. Queue-full triggers fail-open (drop scan task, keep forwarding).
